features.name: else_if reuses clock signal in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an if-else if chain where the else if condition re-checks the same signal used as clock edge in the always block sensitivity list
features.snippet: always @ (posedge clk) if (cond) begin y <= 1'b0; end else if (clk) begin y <= !clk; end

features.name: negation of clock signal in procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment where the right-hand side is a negation of the clock signal used in the sensitivity list
features.snippet: always @ (posedge clk) if (cond) begin y <= 1'b0; end else if (clk) begin y <= !clk; end

features.name: output assigned in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include an output signal that is assigned using non-blocking assignment inside an edge-triggered always block
features.snippet:
output reg var_ac;
always @ (posedge var_ad) if (var_ab) begin var_ac <= 1'b0; end
